name: PGYTECH Wash Pouch
description: Keep your toiletries dry and organized with the twilight black Wash Pouch from PGY Tech. Two zippered interior pockets ensure your wet and dry items remain separate.

features.Key Features:: Wet and Dry Separation Design | Multiple Pockets and Elastic Loops | Splash-Resistant Fabric and Lining | Splash-Resistant YKK Zippers | Convenient Carry Handle | Stowable Hook
